_description: Generates a single character on plain white background. Use SAME style as scene.
_limitation: NO IP-Adapter for SD 3.5 Medium - use detailed prompts for consistency

inputs.text:
Character reference sheet for children's storybook.

STYLE:
{{STYLE}}

CHARACTER:
{{CHARACTER}}

POSE:
{{POSE}}

BACKGROUND:
Plain white background, solid neutral color, completely empty backdrop, no environment, no scene, no props, no floor details, no shadows on ground.

RULES:
- EXACTLY ONE character only
- Character fully visible, not cropped
- Plain white or light gray background ONLY
- NO environment, NO scene, NO landscape
- NO props, NO furniture, NO objects
- Character isolated for easy extraction
- Consistent with the specified art style
- No text, no watermark, no logo

background, environment, scene, landscape, forest, sky, grass, floor, ground, setting, props, furniture, trees, buildings, nature, outdoor, indoor, room, multiple characters, crowd, group, two heads, multiple heads, extra limbs, deformed, cropped, cut off, photorealistic, 3d render, text, watermark, logo
